FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.23sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f3367f1fb00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:44:33Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:42:10Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/01 00:46:36.890431320 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890436478 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890458531 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890459322 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890475537 {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890476088 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890485392 new <- list()
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890485963 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890496589 new$width <- width
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890497120 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890509508 new$height <- height
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890510089 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890523370 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890524602 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890537702 new$title <- title
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890538363 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890549430 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890549970 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890560917 new$version <- version
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890561478 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890572605 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890573146 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890584383 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890592936 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890609390 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890610162 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890620567 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890621098 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890631945 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890632736 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890644544 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890645095 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890666777 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890667589 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890680388 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890681159 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890693468 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890694099 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890706067 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890706638 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890718626 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890719197 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890733118 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890733949 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890747289 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890747840 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890761701 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890762272 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890774611 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890775232 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890786198 }
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890786869 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890798187 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890798767 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890810285 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890810896 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890818487 }
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890824776 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890829914 }
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890837286 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890838037 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890849755 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890850275 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890862554 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890863085 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890874272 }
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890874843 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890886270 old$family <- family
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890886821 }
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890896516 version <- old$version
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890897106 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890908584 "2.0")
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890909215 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890920231 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890920802 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890933672 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890934263 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890945540 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890946091 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890957919 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890958519 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890973082 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890973682 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890989386 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/01 00:46:36.890990017 invisible()
2026/05/01 00:46:36.891001995 }
